name: Security - Content Safety Guardrails on Input
description: Ensures that the with_content_safety decorator is invoked and blocks queries with known unsafe content.
input: POST /query with JSON body: {"user_query": "<unsafe input known to trigger guardrails>"}
output: JSON response with success=false or error message indicating content safety violation
success_criteria: response.json()['success'] is False or error indicates content safety violation
